title: Add register command (POST /register)
description: Add a specter register command for creating new users. Flags: --email, --username, --invite-code. Calls POST /register (no auth required). On success, display the token and generated invite codes.

title: Add single-document CRUD commands
description: Add client methods and CLI commands for single-document operations: PUT /documents/:owner/:slug/:path (create/update) and DELETE /documents/:owner/:slug/:path. Requires editor role. Could be exposed as specter doc put/delete.

title: Add me command (GET /me)
description: Add a specter me command to show current user info. Calls GET /me with auth. Display id, email, username, and invite codes (with redeemed status).
close_reason: Implemented me command with User type, Me() API method, and cmd/me.go

title: Add invite commands (create + redeem)
description: Add specter invite and specter invite redeem commands. Create: POST /invites with --role flag (editor|reviewer|reader), owner only. Redeem: POST /invites/redeem with --code flag. Needed for multi-user collaboration.

title: Add projects list command (GET /projects)
description: Add a specter projects command to list projects the user is a member of. Calls GET /projects. Display owner, slug, full_name, name, and role for each project.
close_reason: Implemented projects list command with ListProjects() API method and cmd/projects.go

title: Add project delete command (DELETE /projects/:owner/:slug)
description: Add a specter project delete command. Calls DELETE /projects/:owner/:slug. Owner only. Should require confirmation before deleting.
close_reason: Implemented project delete command with confirmation prompt and --force flag

title: Fix minor API inconsistencies
description: Two small fixes: 1) review command maps accept->accepted via string concat (action + "ed") — use an explicit map instead. 2) GetDocument doesn't encode special characters in doc paths — consider segment-by-segment encoding for paths with spaces or special chars.
